simplisafe_name.title: SimpliSafe Accessory Name
simplisafe_name.description: Display name of the SimpliSafe3 SecuritySystem accessory in HomeKit (must match exactly).

ad_accessory_name.title: AlarmDecoder Accessory Name
ad_accessory_name.description: Display name of the AlarmDecoder SecuritySystem accessory in HomeKit (must match exactly).

alarm_code.title: Alarm Code (PIN)
alarm_code.description: Your alarm panel PIN. Sent as a keystring prefix to the AlarmDecoder webapp.

ad_host.title: AlarmDecoder Host
ad_host.description: IP address or hostname of the AlarmDecoder webapp.

ad_port.title: AlarmDecoder Port
ad_port.description: TCP port of the AlarmDecoder webapp REST API.

ad_api_key.title: AlarmDecoder API Key
ad_api_key.description: API key from the AlarmDecoder web interface. Sent as the Authorization header.

ad_trigger_zone.title: Alarm Trigger Zone
ad_trigger_zone.description: Optional. Zone number to fault on the AlarmDecoder when SimpliSafe enters Alarm Triggered state, and restore when disarmed. Must be an emulated zone (9–48) configured in the AlarmDecoder webapp and programmed in the panel. Leave blank to disable.

hb_ui_url.title: Homebridge UI URL
hb_ui_url.description: Base URL of homebridge-config-ui-x. Used to query and observe accessories across child bridges.

hb_ui_username.title: Homebridge UI Username
hb_ui_username.description: Admin username for homebridge-config-ui-x. Recommended: create a dedicated user for this plugin.

hb_ui_password.title: Homebridge UI Password
hb_ui_password.description: Password for the Homebridge UI user above.
